Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Welcome to the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Ah... It appears we have a very rare guest indeed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Are you human? Or merely humanoid?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}It seems your destiny is similar to mine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Ah, forgive my manners. Allow me to introduce myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}My name is Igor. And this is my assistant Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}We both reside here in the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}This place exists between mind and matter. It is a room for those who have forged a contract.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Yes... In awakening to the power of the wild card, you are now bound to a contract.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Henceforth, you shall be our guest in the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Surely you know that of which I speak. The ability to wield multiple Personas and their powers...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Until recently, a young man with the same talent was our guest here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 12 2 53 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Are you saying that you knew him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Indeed I did. He achieved a marvelous thing—finding the answer to life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}The power you have gained is a means to attain that answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}All who live journey in search of the answer, and they find it at the journey's end.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}If you have close ties to people you call friends, remember this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}"Strength of heart, when united, is barred by no door."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It was the same for that young man.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}And that is all I can tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Well then, I mustn't hold you here any longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}It would appear that an ordeal is about to unfold upon your return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I am certain you will require our help in the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}It would be best if you came here of your own free will next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I once made a choice to live.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}So much has changed[n]since then, myself included.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}If this new power is a sign[n]that I'm drawing closer to life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}...does it mean that the answer[n]at the end of the journey is... death?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I was surprised, at the time, to discover[n]how little the possibility bothered me.[n]{f 1 1}
